en.title: Best Water Filters of 2026: Pitchers, Under-Sink and Reverse Osmosis Ranked
en.description: Lab-tested water filters ranked for lead, PFAS and TDS removal, spanning $35 pitchers to full reverse osmosis systems, with the NSF certifications and filter costs that actually matter.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳淨水器排行榜：濾水壺、櫥下型與逆滲透實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 從一千多元的濾水壺到整套逆滲透，用除鉛、除 PFAS、除 TDS 的實驗室數據排名，把 NSF 認證和濾芯成本一次講清楚。

en.description: Under-sink reverse osmosis with built-in remineralization, a 1:1 pure-to-drain ratio and app-tracked filter sensors, scoring 9.24/10 in independent lab testing.

zh-tw.description: 櫥下型逆滲透，內建礦物質回添，出水對排水做到 1:1，還有 APP 追蹤濾芯壽命。實驗室實測拿到 9.24 分，礦化後 TDS 維持在 66 ppm，喝起來比一般純水順口很多，這台是我心中的整體首選。

en.description: Countertop 4-stage reverse osmosis that removes 84 IAPMO-certified contaminants and collects water in a borosilicate glass carafe, with zero plumbing or drilling.

zh-tw.description: 免安裝的檯面型四道逆滲透，IAPMO 認證實測除掉 84 種污染物，純水裝進玻璃壺而不是塑膠桶，少了塑化劑溶出的疑慮。租屋族不能動水管又想要逆滲透水質，這台幾乎是唯一解。

en.description: Five-stage under-sink reverse osmosis built in the USA that ranked first in TechGearLab's December 2025 test, running about $75 a year in replacement filters.

zh-tw.description: 美國製的五道櫥下型逆滲透，TechGearLab 2025 年 12 月實測把它排在十三台之首，贏過貴三倍的無桶機種。一年濾芯成本才台幣兩千出頭，想要逆滲透又不想被高階機種的價格嚇跑，這台就是甜蜜點。

en.description: Tankless under-sink reverse osmosis pushing 800 gallons a day at a 3:1 ratio with integrated UV sterilization, the top-scoring tankless RO in lab testing at 9.21/10.

zh-tw.description: 無桶式櫥下逆滲透，一天出水 800 加侖，出水對排水 3:1，還內建 UV 殺菌。實驗室量到的實際產水量甚至超過原廠標示，接水幾乎不用等。家裡人多、用水量大又受不了傳統壓力桶佔空間，這台就是為你準備的。

en.description: Under-sink RO paired with Aquasana's Claryum carbon block, certified to NSF 42, 53, 58 and 401 for 88 contaminants and finished with a remineralizer for taste.

zh-tw.description: 櫥下逆滲透再串一道 Aquasana 自家的 Claryum 活性碳，拿到 NSF 42、53、58、401 四項認證，實測除掉 88 種污染物，包含 95% 的氟。逆滲透後再礦化回添鈣鎂鉀，喝起來有回甘。想要認證項目最完整的那一台，選它準沒錯。

en.description: Six-stage under-sink RO with an alkaline remineralization stage, NSF 58 certified and built for DIY install with quick-fit push tubing.

zh-tw.description: 六道櫥下逆滲透，多一道鹼性礦化把礦物質補回來，NSF 58 認證，推入式快接管線讓你自己動手裝也不會卡關。想要弱鹼性口感又不想多花錢買品牌溢價，這台是 CP 值很高的務實選擇。

en.description: The pitcher Consumer Reports names best for most people, with a fast flow rate and lead-reducing filtration that rivals far pricier systems.

zh-tw.description: Consumer Reports 直接點名最適合大多數人的濾水壺，過濾速度快，除鉛表現追得上很多貴一大截的機種。一千出頭、免安裝、放進冰箱就能用，第一次認真淨水的人從這台開始最實在。

en.description: A five-stage pitcher that drives TDS to zero and ships with a water-quality meter, the go-to pick for high-TDS tap water where taste needs the deepest scrub.

zh-tw.description: 五道過濾的濾水壺，能把 TDS 壓到接近零，還附一支水質檢測筆讓你親眼看到數字。住在自來水 TDS 偏高的區域、對水味特別敏感的話，這台的過濾深度是濾水壺裡最狠的。濾芯消耗快是它的代價。

en.description: A compact two-stage under-sink carbon block that installs in minutes without a separate faucet, delivering full-pressure filtered water straight from the tap.

zh-tw.description: 小巧的兩道櫥下活性碳，幾分鐘就裝好，不用另外拉專用龍頭，直接從原本水龍頭出全水壓的過濾水。不想搞逆滲透那套廢水和壓力桶，只想把氯味和沉積物濾掉、出水又快，這台剛剛好。

en.description: Brita's only NSF 53 lead-certified pitcher, with a 6-month Elite filter that keeps the lowest running cost of any pitcher we tracked.

zh-tw.description: Brita 唯一拿到 NSF 53 除鉛認證的濾水壺，搭 Elite 濾芯能撐半年才換一次，長期算下來每公升成本是所有濾水壺裡最低的。預算有限又想要一台不用常換濾芯的入門壺，這台最省心。

references.title: 8 Best Reverse Osmosis Systems of 2026 We've Tested
The Best Water Filters of 2026 | Lab Tested & Ranked
Cloud RO Review: What the Lab Test Revealed 2026

en.commentary: I rank Cloud RO first because it fixes the two things that make people quietly hate reverse osmosis: the stripped, flat taste and the three-gallons-wasted-per-gallon math. It builds remineralization in at no extra cost and runs a genuine 1:1 efficiency ratio, then backs it with a 9.24/10 lab score and NSF 58 certification. That is the rare RO system I would install and forget about. The real story of 2026 is that reverse osmosis has gone mainstream, driven by PFAS and lead headlines, and the field has split into clear lanes. If you can drill under your sink and want the best value, the APEC ROES-50 is a 20-year-old design that still ranked first at TechGearLab and costs about $75 a year to feed. If you rent or refuse to touch plumbing, the AquaTru Carafe delivers certified RO water into a glass carafe with nothing but a power outlet. For a big household, the tankless Waterdrop G3P800 pours 800 gallons a day with UV on top. Pitchers still earn their place. The PUR Plus is the one I hand to anyone starting out at $35, and the Brita Elite is the only pitcher I trust for certified lead reduction at the lowest running cost. Match the filter to your water report and your sink, and every option here holds up.

highlights.title: Cloud RO wins by solving RO's two oldest complaints
highlights.body: Reverse osmosis has always carried two knocks: flat-tasting water and heavy waste. Cloud RO answers both directly. Its built-in remineralization stage adds back calcium, magnesium, potassium and zinc and holds TDS around 66 ppm, so the water tastes alive, and its 1:1 efficiency ratio sends one gallon to drain for every gallon it makes. A 9.24/10 lab score and NSF 58 certification confirm the removal is real, and app-based filter sensors mean you replace cartridges on data instead of guesswork.

highlights.title: The APEC ROES-50 is the value benchmark the whole category answers to
highlights.body: A design that has been on the market for two decades still ranked first out of thirteen systems in TechGearLab's December 2025 test, beating tankless units that cost triple. It uses a proven Dow Filmtec membrane, reduces nearly every tested pollutant to undetectable levels, and runs about $75 a year in filters. If you can spare an afternoon and a spot under the sink, this is the most water quality per dollar on the market.

highlights.title: AquaTru Carafe is the answer for renters who can't touch plumbing
highlights.body: Certified reverse osmosis usually means drilling, a drain saddle and a dedicated faucet. The AquaTru Carafe removes 84 IAPMO-certified contaminants including PFAS, lead and fluoride using nothing but a countertop and a power outlet, then collects the result in a borosilicate glass carafe that sidesteps the microplastic leaching of plastic RO tanks. Filters cost more per gallon than a plumbed system, which is the fair trade for zero installation.

highlights.title: Pick your filter from your water report, not the price tag
highlights.body: The right choice starts with what is actually in your water. High TDS or bad taste points to ZeroWater's five-stage pitcher and its bundled meter. A lead advisory points to anything NSF 53 certified, which the Brita Elite and every RO system here carry. PFAS or fluoride concern points to reverse osmosis, full stop, since carbon pitchers do not reliably remove them. Buy the certification that matches your problem and skip paying for the ones you do not need.

zh-tw.commentary: 我把 Cloud RO 放第一，因為它一次解決了大家私底下最討厭逆滲透的兩件事:純水喝起來死板板，還有出一加侖廢三加侖的浪費。它把礦化功能免費內建進去，礦化後 TDS 維持在 66 ppm,喝起來有活性;出水對排水做到真正的 1:1,幾乎不浪費。再加上實驗室 9.24 分和 NSF 58 認證背書，這是少數我裝了就能忘記它存在的逆滲透。2026 年最大的變化，是逆滲透因為 PFAS 和鉛的新聞而正式走向大眾，整個市場也分出清楚的路線。能在水槽下鑽孔、又想要最高 CP 值，APEC ROES-50 這個賣了二十年的老設計照樣在 TechGearLab 拿下第一，一年濾芯才台幣兩千出頭。租屋族不能動水管，AquaTru Carafe 插上電就把認證等級的逆滲透水裝進玻璃壺。家裡人多用水兇，無桶的 Waterdrop G3P800 一天出水 800 加侖還附 UV 殺菌。濾水壺也還有它的位置，PUR Plus 是我會推薦給每個新手的一千元入門款，Brita Elite 則是長期成本最低、又有除鉛認證的那一台。先看你家的水質報告和水槽條件，再對號入座，這份榜單上每一台都站得住腳。

highlights.title: Cloud RO 靠解決逆滲透兩個老毛病拿下第一
highlights.body: 逆滲透長年被嫌兩件事:水喝起來死板，還有廢水太兇。Cloud RO 兩個都正面回應。內建礦化把鈣、鎂、鉀、鋅補回來，TDS 穩定在 66 ppm 左右，水喝起來有活性;1:1 的效率比代表每做一加侖純水只排一加侖廢水。實驗室 9.24 分加上 NSF 58 認證證明除污是玩真的，APP 濾芯感測器讓你照數據換濾芯，不用再憑感覺猜。

highlights.title: APEC ROES-50 是整個品類都要對標的 CP 值標竿
highlights.body: 一個在市場上賣了二十年的設計，在 TechGearLab 2025 年 12 月的實測裡照樣從十三台中拿下第一，贏過貴三倍的無桶機。它用經過驗證的 Dow Filmtec 膜，幾乎把所有受測污染物壓到偵測不到，一年濾芯成本大約台幣兩千出頭。只要你騰得出一個下午和水槽下一塊空間，這台就是每一塊錢換到最多水質的選擇。

highlights.title: 不能動水管的租屋族，答案就是 AquaTru Carafe
highlights.body: 認證等級的逆滲透通常意味著鑽孔、接排水、拉專用龍頭。AquaTru Carafe 只要一塊檯面和一個插座，就實測除掉 84 種 IAPMO 認證的污染物，包含 PFAS、鉛和氟，純水還裝進玻璃壺，避開塑膠壓力桶的微塑膠溶出。濾芯每公升成本比固定式高，這是換來免安裝的合理代價。

highlights.title: 選濾水器要看水質報告，不是看價格標籤
highlights.body: 正確的選擇從你家水裡到底有什麼開始。TDS 高或水味差，就往 ZeroWater 五道濾水壺和它附的檢測筆走。收到鉛超標通知，就認明 NSF 53 認證，Brita Elite 和這裡每一台逆滲透都有。擔心 PFAS 或氟，那就直接上逆滲透，因為活性碳濾水壺沒辦法穩定濾掉這兩樣。買對應你問題的那張認證，不需要的就別多花錢。

references.title: 8 Best Reverse Osmosis Systems of 2026 We've Tested
AquaTru Scores Good Housekeeping 2026 Kitchen Award, Esquire's Best Water Purifier

en.commentary: The Cloud RO undersink system keeps my top ranking because it delivers full reverse osmosis contaminant removal with the certifications to back it, then hides the hardware out of sight under the sink. For a household that wants the cleanest water on tap without a jug to refill, that is the setup I recommend first. The AquaTru Carafe stays a strong second, and this month it kept collecting hardware, taking a Good Housekeeping 2026 Kitchen Award and Esquire's best water purifier nod. It holds IAPMO certification to NSF 42, 53, 58, and 401 across 83 contaminants, removes lead, fluoride, and uranium at the tap, and needs zero plumbing. Set it on the counter, plug it in, done. That convenience is why it stays my top countertop pick. The APEC ROES-50 remains the value workhorse for anyone comfortable with an undersink install, pairing long filter life with a genuinely low running cost. Waterdrop and Aquasana keep their spots for strong all-round RO performance. On the pitcher side, the PUR Plus and ZeroWater stay the grab-and-go picks for renters who cannot plumb anything in. One honest caveat I always repeat: thorough RO strips beneficial minerals along with the bad stuff, so a remineralizing stage is worth it if taste matters to you. Nothing this week reordered the list, so I am holding ranks steady. My advice stands: choose the Cloud RO or APEC for a permanent undersink setup, the AquaTru for no-install countertop purity, and a quality pitcher if you rent. Match the system to your kitchen and your effort tolerance.

highlights.title: Cloud RO is the top undersink pick
highlights.body: Full reverse osmosis removal with the certifications to back it, tucked out of sight under the sink. My first pick for clean water on tap.

highlights.title: AquaTru Carafe keeps winning awards
highlights.body: A Good Housekeeping 2026 Kitchen Award and Esquire's best purifier nod, plus IAPMO certification across 83 contaminants and zero plumbing. The top countertop pick.

highlights.title: APEC ROES-50 is the value workhorse
highlights.body: Long filter life and a genuinely low running cost make it the smart buy for anyone fine with an undersink install.

highlights.title: Remineralize for taste
highlights.body: Thorough RO strips good minerals along with contaminants, so a remineralizing stage is worth it if taste matters to you.

zh-tw.commentary: Cloud RO 廚下型系統守住我心中第一，因為它給你完整的 RO 逆滲透去汙能力，還有認證撐腰，然後把整組設備藏在水槽底下看不到的地方。一個家庭想要打開水龍頭就有最乾淨的水、又不想一直裝水壺，我第一個推的就是這套。AquaTru Carafe 穩坐第二，這個月它獎項又拿到手軟，抱回 Good Housekeeping 2026 廚房大獎，還被 Esquire 選為最佳淨水器。它有 IAPMO 認證，符合 NSF 42、53、58、401，涵蓋 83 種汙染物，能在水龍頭端去除鉛、氟、鈾，而且完全不用接管線。放檯面、插電、搞定。這種方便，就是它穩坐檯面型首選的原因。APEC ROES-50 還是那台高性價比的工作馬，願意裝廚下型的人很適合，濾芯壽命長、運轉成本又是真的低。Waterdrop 跟 Aquasana 守住位置，RO 整體表現都很扎實。濾水壺這邊，PUR Plus 跟 ZeroWater 還是租屋族的即拿即用之選，不能接管線也能用。一個我每次都會叮嚀的老實話：RO 過濾太徹底，好的礦物質會連著壞東西一起被拿掉，在意口感的話，加一道礦化程序是值得的。這禮拜沒有洗牌，名次按住。建議還是老話：想裝固定廚下型選 Cloud RO 或 APEC，想免安裝的檯面純淨選 AquaTru，租屋就選一支好濾水壺。照你的廚房跟願意花的工夫配系統。

highlights.title: Cloud RO 是廚下型首選
highlights.body: 完整 RO 去汙加認證撐腰，設備藏在水槽下看不到。想打開龍頭就有乾淨水，我第一個推它。

highlights.title: AquaTru Carafe 獎拿到手軟
highlights.body: 抱回 Good Housekeeping 2026 廚房大獎、Esquire 最佳淨水器，還有 IAPMO 認證涵蓋 83 種汙染物、免接管線。檯面型首選。

highlights.title: APEC ROES-50 是高性價比工作馬
highlights.body: 濾芯壽命長、運轉成本低，願意裝廚下型的人買它最聰明。

highlights.title: 在意口感就礦化
highlights.body: RO 太徹底會把好礦物質一起拿掉，在意口感就加一道礦化程序，值得。

references.title: The Best Water Filters of 2026 That We've Personally Tested
The Best Under-Sink Water Filters of 2026, Expert-Tested and Reviewed
8 Best Reverse Osmosis Systems of 2026 We’ve Tested

en.commentary: My water filter order holds this week, and the fresh lab testing keeps validating the top of the list. Cloud RO stays my number one because it posted the best score of any under-sink reverse osmosis system reviewers have tested, removing up to 100 percent of the contaminants with health effects they detected, and that is the number that matters most when you are filtering drinking water for a household. AquaTru's countertop carafe holds second as the no-plumbing pick, delivering genuine RO-grade filtration with the easiest install in the category, which is exactly what I recommend to renters who cannot touch the plumbing. The APEC ROES-50 keeps third and stays my value champion for a permanent under-sink system, earning near-perfect contaminant-removal marks with some of the best long-term running costs, and reviewers this month keep singling it out for great-tasting water and a manageable install. Waterdrop's tankless G3P800 holds fourth for people who want RO without a bulky tank, and Aquasana's OptimH2O keeps fifth for its eco-minded, high-certification approach. Further down, iSpring is the value tinkerer's pick, and the pitcher options from PUR, ZeroWater, and Brita stay the answers for renters who just want better-tasting tap water today. No launch this week shifts a rank, so the list stands on tested performance.

highlights.title: Cloud RO stays the top performer
highlights.body: It posted the best score of any under-sink RO reviewers have tested, removing up to 100 percent of detected health-effect contaminants, holding rank one.

highlights.title: AquaTru is the no-plumbing pick
highlights.body: Its countertop carafe delivers genuine RO-grade filtration with the easiest install, my recommendation for renters who cannot touch the plumbing.

highlights.title: APEC ROES-50 wins on value
highlights.body: Near-perfect contaminant removal plus low long-term costs keep it third, and reviewers keep praising its great-tasting water and manageable install.

highlights.title: Waterdrop suits tankless setups
highlights.body: The G3P800 holds fourth for people who want reverse osmosis without a bulky tank taking up the cabinet.

zh-tw.commentary: 淨水器這週的排名守住，最新的實驗室測試一直在替榜單頂端背書。Cloud RO 繼續是我的第一名，因為它拿下評測測過所有廚下型逆滲透系統中最高的分數，把偵測到的有健康影響的汙染物去除高達百分之百，而這正是你替全家過濾飲用水時最該看的數字。AquaTru 的桌上型濾水壺守住第二，是免接管路的選擇，用這個級距最簡單的安裝提供貨真價實的 RO 級過濾，這正是我推給不能動管路的租屋族的選擇。APEC ROES-50 守住第三，是我心中固定式廚下系統的性價冠軍，拿到近乎滿分的汙染物去除評價，長期使用成本又是數一數二的低，這個月的評測一直點名它出水好喝又安裝不難搞。Waterdrop 無桶式的 G3P800 守住第四，適合想要 RO 又不想要笨重儲水桶的人，Aquasana OptimH2O 守第五，走的是重環保、高認證的路線。往下看，iSpring 是喜歡自己動手的性價選擇，PUR、ZeroWater、Brita 的濾水壺守住位置，是那種今天就想喝到更好喝自來水的租屋族的答案。這週沒有新品撼動名次，所以榜單靠實測表現站著。

highlights.title: Cloud RO 穩坐效能第一
highlights.body: 它拿下評測測過所有廚下型 RO 中最高分，把偵測到有健康影響的汙染物去除高達百分之百，守住第一。

highlights.title: AquaTru 是免接管路首選
highlights.body: 桌上型濾水壺用這個級距最簡單的安裝提供貨真價實的 RO 級過濾，是我推給不能動管路租屋族的選擇。

highlights.title: APEC ROES-50 贏在性價比
highlights.body: 近乎滿分的汙染物去除加超低長期成本讓它守第三，評測一直誇它出水好喝又安裝不難搞。

highlights.title: Waterdrop 適合無桶配置
highlights.body: G3P800 守住第四，適合想要逆滲透又不想要笨重儲水桶佔滿櫃子的人。

references.title: Best Water Filters for PFAS Forever Chemicals of 2026
8 Best Reverse Osmosis Systems of 2026 We've Tested
The Best Water Filters of 2026, Lab Tested and Ranked

en.commentary:
The Cloud RO undersink system holds first because it delivers reverse osmosis performance without the countertop footprint or the tank refill routine, and its certification coverage is broad. That combination is what most households actually need.

The AquaTru Carafe earns a bump to 9.3 and it is the most interesting result in this category right now. Fresh lab testing had it eliminate 100 percent of the contaminants with health effects present in the test water, including complete removal of lead, fluoride, uranium, molybdenum, barium, and chlorine. It is IAPMO certified to NSF 42, 53, 58, and 401 across 83 contaminants. Its 4 to 1 recovery rate is the most efficient measured in a reverse osmosis system, which matters more than people realize since typical RO wastes three or four gallons for every gallon produced. I am raising contaminant removal to 9.6 and certification to 9.6. It stays second only because a carafe you refill by hand asks more of you daily than a plumbed undersink unit.

The Waterdrop G3P800 deserves its own mention for cost. IAPMO certified to NSF/ANSI 53 for PFOA and PFOS, and running at about $0.11 per gallon, the lowest ongoing cost of any PFAS capable filter measured this year. I am raising its filter life to 8.6 and value to 8.7 on that data. Over five years, running cost dominates the purchase price for these systems.

On PFAS generally, the evidence keeps pointing the same direction. Reverse osmosis reduces PFAS by 94 percent or more in most testing, with two stage systems approaching complete removal. If forever chemicals are your reason for buying, buy RO. For a household that wants meaningful improvement without plumbing work, an NSF 53 certified pitcher is the honest entry point, and the PUR Plus at seventh does that job well.

highlights.title: AquaTru Carafe rises to 9.3
highlights.body: Fresh lab testing had it eliminate 100 percent of the health effect contaminants in the test water, with IAPMO certification to NSF 42, 53, 58, and 401 across 83 contaminants. Removal and certification both move to 9.6.

highlights.title: A 4 to 1 recovery rate is a real advantage
highlights.body: Typical reverse osmosis discards three or four gallons for every gallon produced. The AquaTru measured the most efficient recovery of any RO system tested, which shows up directly on the water bill.

highlights.title: Waterdrop G3P800 wins on running cost
highlights.body: IAPMO certified to NSF/ANSI 53 for PFOA and PFOS at roughly $0.11 per gallon, the lowest ongoing cost measured this year. Filter life moves to 8.6 and value to 8.7.

highlights.title: For PFAS, buy reverse osmosis
highlights.body: Testing consistently shows RO reducing PFAS by 94 percent or more, with two stage systems approaching complete removal. If forever chemicals are the reason for the purchase, this is the technology that answers it.

highlights.title: Pitchers are the honest entry point
highlights.body: An NSF 53 certified pitcher delivers meaningful reduction with no plumbing work. The PUR Plus at seventh does that job well for households not ready for an undersink install.

zh-tw.commentary:
Cloud RO 櫥下型守住第一，因為它把 RO 的過濾效果做到不佔檯面、也不用一直加水，認證涵蓋範圍又夠廣。這個組合就是大多數家庭真正需要的東西。

AquaTru Carafe 這次加到 9.3，而且是這個類別現在最值得講的結果。新的實驗室測試裡，測試水中所有對健康有影響的污染物它清掉 100%，鉛、氟化物、鈾、鉬、鋇、餘氯全數移除。它有 IAPMO 認證，涵蓋 NSF 42、53、58、401，共 83 種污染物。它 4:1 的回收率是所有測過的 RO 系統裡最有效率的，這件事比大家想的重要，因為一般 RO 每產出一加侖要排掉三到四加侖。我把污染物移除拉到 9.6，認證拉到 9.6。它還是第二名，純粹因為手動加水的壺型每天要求你多做一點事，櫥下型接管的不用。

Waterdrop G3P800 的使用成本值得單獨講。它有 IAPMO 認證，符合 NSF/ANSI 53 的 PFOA 跟 PFOS 標準，每加侖運轉成本約 0.11 美元，是今年量測過能處理 PFAS 的濾水器裡最低的。根據這個數據，我把它的濾芯壽命拉到 8.6，性價比拉到 8.7。這類系統算五年下來，運轉成本會超過購買價格。

PFAS 這一塊，證據一直指向同一個方向。多數測試裡 RO 能把 PFAS 降低 94% 以上，兩段式系統接近完全移除。如果你買濾水器就是為了永久性化學物質，直接買 RO。想要有感改善又不想動到水管的家庭，有 NSF 53 認證的濾水壺是誠實的入門選擇，排第七的 PUR Plus 就把這件事做得不錯。

highlights.title: AquaTru Carafe 升到 9.3
highlights.body: 新的實驗室測試裡，測試水中對健康有影響的污染物它清掉 100%，IAPMO 認證涵蓋 NSF 42、53、58、401 共 83 種污染物。移除力跟認證都拉到 9.6。

highlights.title: 4:1 回收率是實打實的優勢
highlights.body: 一般 RO 每產出一加侖要排掉三到四加侖。這台是所有測過的 RO 系統裡回收率最高的，直接反映在水費上。

highlights.title: Waterdrop G3P800 贏在運轉成本
highlights.body: IAPMO 認證符合 NSF/ANSI 53 的 PFOA 與 PFOS，每加侖約 0.11 美元，是今年量到最低的。濾芯壽命升到 8.6，性價比 8.7。

highlights.title: 要處理 PFAS，就買 RO
highlights.body: 測試一致顯示 RO 可把 PFAS 降低 94% 以上，兩段式系統接近完全移除。買濾水器的理由如果是永久性化學物質，答案就是這個技術。

highlights.title: 濾水壺是誠實的入門
highlights.body: 有 NSF 53 認證的濾水壺，不用動水管也能有感改善水質。還沒準備好裝櫥下型的家庭，排第七的 PUR Plus 把這件事做得不錯。
